title: Zhao Xinmeng
content:
Zhao Xinmeng
 is a member of the Purple Division of the 
Heavenly Fate Sect
 on 
Planet Tian Yun
.

Appearance
[
]

She was extremely charming and despite having a voluptuous figure she looked graceful.

Background
[
]

She joined the 
Heavenly Fate Sect
 at the age of seven.

History
[
]

She sealed 
Wang Lin
 for a few days to pay off 
Zhao Xingsha
's favor. To resolve the enmity between them, she taught Wang Lin Great Teleportation and the incomplete Nine Cycle Celestial Refining Tactic.

She battled Wang Lin for the title of the True-Disciple of Purple Division but she only did so as a sport as she wasn't really all that interested in the position.

Hundreds of years later, when Wang Lin returned to the Heavenly Fate Sect, she told him the secret about All-Seer that he devours all his disciples that reach 
Illusory Yin
. Her real cultivation is at the Illusory Yin stage but she has kept it sealed for centuries in an effort to prolong her life. She is also in contact with 
Sun Hong
 and 
Lu Hai
 from the Red Division who also have their cultivations sealed.

She asked for Wang Lin's help in reinforcing her seal which has begun to loosen.
